mapper.insert:
insert into ess_device (
member_id, group_id, device_name, location, capacity_kw, device_type, status, install_date,
latitude, longitude, nx, ny,
is_main,
ess_capacity_kwh, current_charge_kwh,
charge_efficiency, discharge_efficiency,
electricity_rate
) values (
#{memberId},
#{groupId},
#{deviceName}, #{location},
#{capacityKw},
#{deviceType}, #{status},
#{installDate},
#{latitude}, #{longitude},
#{nx}, #{ny},
#{isMain},
#{essCapacityKwh}, #{currentChargeKwh},
#{chargeEfficiency}, #{dischargeEfficiency},
#{electricityRate} )
mapper.select: select * from ess_device where member_id = #{value} order by device_id desc

select device_id, member_id, group_id, device_name, location, capacity_kw, device_type, status, install_date, latitude, longitude, nx, ny, is_main, ess_capacity_kwh, current_charge_kwh, charge_efficiency, discharge_efficiency, electricity_rate from ess_device where device_id = #{value}

select d.device_id, d.member_id, d.group_id, d.device_name, d.location, d.capacity_kw, d.device_type, d.status, d.install_date, d.latitude, d.longitude, d.nx, d.ny, d.is_main, d.ess_capacity_kwh, d.current_charge_kwh, d.charge_efficiency, d.discharge_efficiency, d.electricity_rate, g.group_name, m.soc, m.record_time from ess_device d left join ess_device_group g on d.group_id = g.group_id left join monitoring m on m.device_id = d.device_id and m.record_time = ( select max(m2.record_time) from monitoring m2 where m2.device_id = d.device_id ) where d.member_id = #{value} order by d.device_id desc

SELECT device_id, member_id, group_id, device_name, location, capacity_kw, device_type, status, install_date, latitude, longitude, nx, ny, is_main, ess_capacity_kwh, current_charge_kwh, charge_efficiency, discharge_efficiency, electricity_rate FROM ess_device WHERE status != 'OFFLINE' ORDER BY device_id ASC
select device_id, member_id, device_name, location, capacity_kw, device_type, status, install_date, is_main from ess_device where member_id = #{value} and is_main = 'Y' limit 1
